name: hyperflow
description: Point it at a GitHub issue, get back a reviewed PR in Codex App and CLI. Inline-fast for proven 1-2 file fixes; Worker to Reviewer for the rest. Lean mode default, local visual artefacts, project memory that stays in your repo.

interface.shortDescription: Issue to reviewed PR: routing, workers, specialists, local memory
interface.longDescription: Hyperflow adds a structured engineering workflow to Codex App and CLI: intent routing, lean mode by default, inline-fast for proven 1-2 file fixes, task decomposition, Worker to Reviewer specialist checks, parallel workers, local visual artefacts and ROI, persistent project memory, security guardrails, and gated release.
defaultPrompt: Use Hyperflow to plan this feature
Debug this failing test with Hyperflow
